ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_num" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "article_sha256" TEXT /* SHA256 hash of the article's content */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the article belongs to */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* The URL of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_uuid" TEXT /* UUID for each task */,
  "schema_namespace" TEXT /* Namespace indicating the schema of the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* A descriptive name for the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the task */,
  "schema_version" TEXT /* The version of the schema used for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the question in the task */,
  "task_uuid" TEXT /* Reference to the associated task UUID */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., checklist) */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question posed to annotators */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* The category of the question (e.g., aspect, entity) */,
  "question_subcategory" TEXT /* A subcategory for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_task_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("task_uuid") REFERENCES tasks ("task_uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the question answered */,
  "agreed_answer" TEXT /* The answer agreed upon by the annotator (e.g., Yes/No) */,
  "num_answer_choices" INTEGER /* Number of choices available to the annotator */,
  "answer_content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the answer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who submitted the answer */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* The date when the answer was submitted */,
  "answer_confidence" REAL /* The confidence level of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_number FOREIGN KEY ("question_number") REFERENCES questions ("question_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agreement_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the question associated with the score */,
  "coding_perc_agreement" REAL /* Percentage of coding agreement among annotators */,
  "agreement_score" REAL /* Overall agreement score for the question */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* The type of agreement (e.g., coding percentage, unitizing) */,
  "agreement_threshold" REAL /* The threshold for agreement (e.g., 0.5 for 50%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agreement_scores_question_number FOREIGN KEY ("question_number") REFERENCES questions ("question_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "unitizing_scores" (
  "unitizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unitizing score record */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the question associated with the score */,
  "unitizing_score" REAL /* Unitizing score based on annotator responses */,
  "unitizing_score_inclusive" REAL /* Inclusive unitizing score considering all responses */,
  "unitizing_metric" TEXT /* The metric used for unitizing (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unitizing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unitizing_scores_question_number FOREIGN KEY ("question_number") REFERENCES questions ("question_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_statistics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "num_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users providing input for a task */,
  "odds_by_chance" REAL /* Odds of agreement by chance for the responses */,
  "binary_odds_by_chance" REAL /* Binary odds of agreement by chance */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., annotator, reviewer) */,
  "user_performance" REAL /* The overall performance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highlighted_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated question */,
  "highlighted_indices" TEXT /* Indices of highlighted text in the response */,
  "highlighted_text" TEXT /* The actual highlighted text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highlighted_indices_question_number FOREIGN KEY ("question_number") REFERENCES questions ("question_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the answer submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the answer was submitted */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* The status of the response (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_tracking_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user participating in the session */,
  "task_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the task being annotated */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the annotation session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the annotation session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* The status of the session (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_sessions_task_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("task_uuid") REFERENCES tasks ("task_uuid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
